value:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out. I appreciate you letting us know about this issue with your photo metadata. It sounds like the location tags on your images are showing "Norton" instead of "Sheffield" even though they're displaying correctly on the map—that's definitely odd and I understand why that would be frustrating.

To help us look into this, could you let me know which app or service you're using to view and organize these photos? That'll help us pinpoint whether this is a display issue on our end or something with how the location data is being recorded.

In the meantime, rest assured we're here to help get this sorted for you.

Best regards
